# Mirrored Benchopt Lasso Solvers

These files are exact copies from:
- Repository: https://github.com/benchopt/benchmark_lasso
- Path: `solvers/`
- Branch: `main`
- Commit: `bafd90d58e087b11d805f8fd340eb55af0f89819`
- Synced on: 2026-04-22

Mirrored files:
- `cd.py`
- `sklearn.py`
- `skglm.py`
- `modopt_fista.py`
- `celer.py`
- `glmnet.py`

In this repo, active benchmark solver files under `benchmarks/benchmark_lasso/solvers/`
for the same names are replaced with these exact mirrored versions.
